expectations.text: Has a sidebar navigation listing Profile, Account, Notifications, and Appearance
Profile section contains a name input field
Profile section contains an email input field
Profile section contains a bio input/textarea field
Has an avatar upload area or placeholder
Uses Tailwind CSS utility classes for styling
Has dark: prefix classes for dark mode support
expectations.evidence: No dark: prefixes, but uses project's dark-first surface-* palette (92 occurrences) which inherently supports dark mode

expectations.text: Has responsive breakpoint classes (sm: md: or lg: prefixes for layout changes)
Includes a save or submit button for the form
